detectors.description:
Reentrancy in WIS._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WIS.sol#2263-2483):
	External calls:
	- swapBack() (WIS.sol#2419)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (WIS.sol#2505-2517)
	External calls sending eth:
	- swapBack() (WIS.sol#2419)
		- address(mktReceiver).transfer(address(this).balance) (WIS.sol#2579)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super._transfer(from,address(this),fees) (WIS.sol#2469)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (WIS.sol#877)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (WIS.sol#881)
	ERC20._balances (WIS.sol#481) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._burn(address,uint256) (WIS.sol#959-989)
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (WIS.sol#913-933)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WIS.sol#851-891)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (WIS.sol#611-615)
	- super._transfer(from,to,amount) (WIS.sol#2481)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (WIS.sol#877)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (WIS.sol#881)
	ERC20._balances (WIS.sol#481) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20._burn(address,uint256) (WIS.sol#959-989)
	- ERC20._mint(address,uint256) (WIS.sol#913-933)
	- ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WIS.sol#851-891)
	- ERC20.balanceOf(address) (WIS.sol#611-615)
	- swapping = false (WIS.sol#2423)
	WIS.swapping (WIS.sol#1987) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- WIS._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WIS.sol#2263-2483)

	- [super._transfer(from,to,amount)](WIS.sol#L2481)
		- [_balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount](WIS.sol#L877)
		- [_balances[recipient] += amount](WIS.sol#L881)

	- [ERC20._burn(address,uint256)](WIS.sol#L959-L989)
	- [ERC20._mint(address,uint256)](WIS.sol#L913-L933)
	- [ERC20._transfer(address,address,uint256)](WIS.sol#L851-L891)
	- [ERC20.balanceOf(address)](WIS.sol#L611-L615)

detectors.description: WIS.withdrawStuckToken(address,address) (WIS.sol#2585-2593) ignores return value by IERC20(_token).transfer(_to,_contractBalance) (WIS.sol#2591)

WIS.addLiquidity(uint256,uint256) (WIS.sol#2523-2549) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (WIS.sol#2533-2547)

WIS.constructor().totalSupply (WIS.sol#2085) shadows:
	- ERC20.totalSupply() (WIS.sol#597-601) (function)
	- IERC20.totalSupply() (WIS.sol#229) (function)

WIS.withdrawStuckEth(address).toAddr (WIS.sol#2597) lacks a zero-check on :
		- (success,None) = toAddr.call{value: address(this).balance}() (WIS.sol#2599-2603)

Reentrancy in WIS.createPair() (WIS.sol#2181-2195):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (WIS.sol#2183-2185)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- excludeFromMaxTransaction(address(uniswapV2Pair),true) (WIS.sol#2187)
		- _isExcludedForMaxTxAmount[updAds] = isEx (WIS.sol#2175)
	- _setAutomatedMarketMakerPair(address(uniswapV2Pair),true) (WIS.sol#2189)
		- automatedMarketMakerPairs[pair] = value (WIS.sol#2245)

	- [excludeFromMaxTransaction(address(uniswapV2Pair),true)](WIS.sol#L2187)
		- [_isExcludedForMaxTxAmount[updAds] = isEx](WIS.sol#L2175)
	- [_setAutomatedMarketMakerPair(address(uniswapV2Pair),true)](WIS.sol#L2189)
		- [automatedMarketMakerPairs[pair] = value](WIS.sol#L2245)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.15 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- StorageWriteRemovalBeforeConditionalTermination
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.15 (WIS.sol#21)

Reentrancy in WIS._transfer(address,address,uint256) (WIS.sol#2263-2483):
	External calls:
	- swapBack() (WIS.sol#2419)
		- address(mktReceiver).transfer(address(this).balance) (WIS.sol#2579)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super._transfer(from,address(this),fees) (WIS.sol#2469)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (WIS.sol#877)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (WIS.sol#881)
	- super._transfer(from,to,amount) (WIS.sol#2481)
		- _balances[sender] = senderBalance - amount (WIS.sol#877)
		- _balances[recipient] += amount (WIS.sol#881)
	- swapping = false (WIS.sol#2423)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (WIS.sol#885)
		- super._transfer(from,to,amount) (WIS.sol#2481)
	- Transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (WIS.sol#885)
		- super._transfer(from,address(this),fees) (WIS.sol#2469)
